title: The Division 2 Lore Coverage
notes: Expected totals remain intentionally unknown until the in-game menus and release-by-release source inventory are captured and reconciled.

categories.label: Lore-bearing collectibles
categories.notes: Category and set totals will be added only after direct in-game inventory evidence is available.

categories.label: People
categories.notes: Three core people now have source-reviewed overview records; no completeness claim has been made.

categories.label: Factions and organizations
categories.notes: Seven factions, SHD and the JTF now have source-reviewed overview records; leadership and subgroup coverage remains incomplete.

categories.label: Locations
categories.notes: Washington and Lower Manhattan have overview records; district and landmark coverage remains incomplete.

categories.label: Missions and events
categories.notes: Five core events now form a sourced relative timeline; mission-level chronology remains incomplete.

categories.label: Diseases and concepts
categories.notes: Green Poison has a foundational overview; antiviral, variants and technical concepts remain separate future records.
